system.notes:
Fast cargo ship of engine, fuel and minimal life support carrying high-priority cargo; proposed, none yet operational.

Spacecraft code (Deep Space p.38): Clipper · 70 · 2 · 2 · Chemical, Nuclear · 6, 12 · Batteries, Fuel Cell, Solar · 60% · 2 · 50m3 · 2 · None · 0 · 6 · 2 · 1 cargo OTV

Decoded (Deep Space p.28 legend): Cost 70 million eb; Crew 2; Passengers 2; Drive Type Chemical, Nuclear; Burn Elements 6, 12; Power Type Batteries, Fuel Cell, Solar; Sensors 60%; Computers 2; Cargo 50m3; Actions 2; Weapon Spaces None; Armor (max SP) 0; Damage Points 6; Overkill Points 2; Shuttlecraft 1 cargo OTV.

Speed is not part of the Deep Space spacecraft code (drive is rated by Burn Elements, not kph); speed fields left at 0.
